name: petos
description: PetOS - sistema SaaS para pet shops, banho e tosa, focado no mercado brasileiro.

scripts.build: node scripts/clean-path.mjs .next && next build && node scripts/prepare-standalone-runtime.mjs
scripts.test:phase3:block2: node --import tsx --test --test-isolation=none tests/server/multiunit/*.test.ts tests/server/appointments/multiunit-read.test.ts tests/server/documents/*.test.ts tests/server/tutor/*.test.ts tests/server/phase3-block2-smoke.test.ts
scripts.test:phase3:block5: node --import tsx --test --test-isolation=none tests/server/ai/*.test.ts tests/server/multiunit/*.test.ts tests/server/appointments/*.test.ts tests/server/documents/*.test.ts tests/server/tutor/*.test.ts tests/server/phase3-governance.test.ts tests/server/phase3-block*.test.ts
scripts.test:phase4: node --import tsx --test --test-isolation=none tests/server/assistant/*.test.ts tests/server/ai/*.test.ts tests/server/tutor/*.test.ts tests/server/phase4-smoke.test.ts
scripts.test:phase5:block1: node --import tsx --test --test-isolation=none tests/server/configuration/*.test.ts tests/server/branding/*.test.ts tests/server/integrations-admin/*.test.ts tests/server/phase5-smoke.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.next/types',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && next typegen && tsc --noEmit
scripts.check:all: npm run ops:preflight && npm run prisma:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.prisma:check: npm run prisma:validate && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.prisma:bootstrap: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.hostinger:bootstrap: npm run prisma:migrate:deploy && npm run prisma:seed
